title: Review onboarding stack selection feature
description: Review the combined onboarding changes for behavioral correctness, scope discipline, regression risk, and consistency between prompts, non-interactive defaults, tests, and documentation.
acceptance_criteria: Review verifies numbered menus, canonical stack handling, and `Other` fallback behavior against the spec.
Review checks that shared stack data is reused rather than duplicated across modules.
Review checks that tests and docs cover the changed behavior adequately.
Review outcome clearly states approved or needs_changes with concrete findings if any.

handoff_summary.completed: Reviewed prompts.py (_select_from_list, STACKS, collect_init_answers), scaffold.py (_language_specific_known_issues, seed_memory_files), cli/commands/init.py (command_init non-interactive defaults), onboarding/__init__.py (exports). Verified all three test files against implementation. Ran full test suite: 1314 passed.
handoff_summary.next_action: Merge the feature via takt merge B-2b9df640 once all other beads in the tree are done.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: None — test files only, no implementation changes in this bead.
handoff_summary.design_decisions: STACKS defined once in prompts.py, re-exported via onboarding/__init__.py. _language_specific_known_issues uses exact canonical name matching (no fuzzy). Non-interactive defaults source dynamically from STACKS[0] to avoid hardcoded strings.
handoff_summary.test_coverage_notes: TestSelectFromList: 10 cases covering valid input, empty→default, non-integer, out-of-range, non-zero default. TestStacksCatalogOtherEntry: 4 spot checks. TestCollectInitAnswers: 7 cases including Other free-text, predefined override, error recovery. TestLanguageSpecificKnownIssues: 14 cases for exact-match semantics (canonical names and negative aliases). TestCommandInit: 11 cases covering non-interactive defaults, overwrite forwarding, interactive delegation.

conflict_risks: None — test files only, no implementation changes in this bead.

execution_history.summary: Approved — implementation is correct, STACKS data reused without duplication, numbered menus and Other fallback work as specified, tests comprehensive, all 1314 tests pass.
